signals.headline: US Announces Imminent Blockade of Iranian Ports as Islamabad Peace Talks Collapse Without Deal | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Announces Imminent Blockade of Iranian Ports as Islamabad Peace Talks Collapse Without Deal | NO | HIGH confidence**  
US Vice President JD Vance departed Pakistan on April 12, 2026, after 21 hours of talks failed due to Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear ambitions or reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with the US military confirming a blockade of Iranian ports to begin "within hours."[1][4][5]

signals.headline: Solana Foundation Introduces Structured Security Approach Across Ecosystem | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Foundation Introduces Structured Security Approach Across Ecosystem | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Solana Foundation responded to a recent exploit by announcing coordinated monitoring and support for DeFi projects, treating security as a shared responsibility to restore network confidence.[1]

signals.headline: Bitcoin Developers Introduce Quantum-Resistant Wallet Rescue Prototype | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Developers Introduce Quantum-Resistant Wallet Rescue Prototype | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin developers unveiled a prototype for quantum-resistant wallet rescue, addressing long-term foundational security risks ahead of potential threats.[1]

signals.headline: Ethereum Explores Standard for AI Agents in Complex DeFi Trades | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Explores Standard for AI Agents in Complex DeFi Trades | YES | MED confidence**  
Ethereum is developing a standard enabling AI agents to execute advanced DeFi trades, with Alchemy unveiling supporting infrastructure for AI payment systems.[1]

signals.headline: SpaceX Holds $603M in Bitcoin Ahead of Planned IPO | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
SpaceX Holds $603M in Bitcoin Ahead of Planned IPO | YES | MED confidence**  
SpaceX retains $603 million in Bitcoin despite losses, with an IPO slated for later this year, signaling sustained corporate adoption.[6]
